- Project: single-package Astro v5 SSG marketing site, TypeScript strict, plain CSS with design tokens, trilingual (es/en/zh), deployed to Firebase Hosting.

- Spec file: specs/feat-1101-issue-101-update-wfr-logo-in-certifications.md

- Exposure: Certifications component is already imported by all three locale landing pages (src/pages/index.astro, src/pages/en/index.astro, src/pages/zh/index.astro); the asset swap propagates to /, /en/, /zh/ automatically. No new wiring required.
- Assumptions (non-load-bearing): (1) the implementer will download the asset once at implementation time and commit it locally rather than hot-link the Firebase URL — this matches the project's documented public/ asset convention; (2) the existing .logo-wfr width rules (118px desktop, 100px mobile) will continue to look balanced with the new artwork, with object-fit: contain absorbing aspect-ratio drift — flagged in the manual verification script for visual confirmation.
